overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a stealth-action game showing a character exploring an ornate historic mansion with Art Deco and Victorian influences. The character moves through dimly lit green-walled hallways, overlooks a grand atrium with a large chandelier, and enters various rooms with detailed vintage furnishings and checkered floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: vintage living room with television set

events.description: character stands up from leather armchair and begins walking toward the hallway

agents.ego_description: rises from armchair and walks steadily toward the room exit, transitioning into the hallway

entered.detail: old CRT television displaying static or images, sitting on wooden stand
dark leather chair where character was seated
long sofa with striped upholstery against the right wall
ornate wall-mounted light fixture providing warm illumination
series of framed artworks hanging on the green wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit vintage living room with green walls and wooden floors. A character rises from a leather armchair near an old television set and begins walking toward the hallway entrance, passing by a striped sofa and wall-mounted lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with green walls and hanging chandeliers

events.description: passes by a guard standing stationary against the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long hallway, passing decorative screens and potted plants

notable_agents.action: guard standing still against the wall, facing the hallway

entered.detail: circular hanging light fixtures with multiple bulbs suspended from ceiling
ornate wooden room divider with lattice pattern
wooden railing overlooking the lower floor atrium

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a long corridor with green paneled walls and wooden floors, illuminated by hanging chandeliers. A guard stands against the right wall as the character passes by decorative screens and approaches a balcony railing overlooking the lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: balcony overlooking grand atrium with large chandelier

events.description: emerges onto balcony overlooking grand atrium with large circular chandelier
camera pans to look down at the lower floor dining area and table

agents.ego_description: pausing at the balcony railing to look down at the atrium and lower floor below

entered.detail: massive ornate chandelier hanging in the center of the atrium
long dining table with chairs visible on the floor below
tall blue velvet curtains hanging by the lower floor windows
large bronze humanoid statue standing on lower floor pedestal

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a balcony overlooking a grand atrium with a massive circular chandelier hanging overhead. The camera pans to reveal the lower floor with a long dining table, blue velvet curtains, and a large bronze statue while the character observes the space from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: upstairs hallway with green carpet and wooden statues

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper hallway with green carpet, passing wooden statues and antique furniture

entered.detail: dark green carpet covering the hallway floor
abstract carved wooden sculpture on pedestal
tall ornate mirror with wooden frame on left wall
red leather armchair against the left wall

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the atrium, the character walks along an upper hallway covered in green carpet. The corridor features wooden statues, ornate wall mirrors, and red leather chairs, with hanging chandeliers providing warm illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: room with checkered floor and red area rug

events.description: enters room with distinctive black and white checkered floor pattern

agents.ego_description: entering and moving through the room with checkered floor, observing the small mechanical toy on the ground

notable_agents.action: small mechanical toy or robot sitting stationary on the floor near the red carpet

entered.detail: black and white checkered tile pattern covering the floor
large red carpet placed over the checkered floor
floor-to-ceiling windows with heavy curtains
circular clock mounted on the wall
small white mechanical figure or toy sitting on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a room with a distinctive black and white checkered floor partially covered by a red area rug. Tall windows with curtains line the walls, and a small mechanical toy sits on the floor near a wall clock.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand bar lounge with skylight and counter

events.description: opens large double doors and enters grand bar lounge area with skylight above

agents.ego_description: walking through hallway and entering large bar area through double doors, approaching the central counter

notable_agents.action: body lying prone on the floor near the bar entrance

entered.detail: large carved wooden doors that open into the bar area
long wooden bar with bottles and glasses visible behind it
glass skylight in the ceiling allowing some light into the space
human figure lying on the wooden floor near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character exits the checkered room and walks through a final hallway before opening large double doors into a grand bar lounge. The space features a high ceiling with a skylight, a long wooden bar counter, and a body lying on the floor near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit historic mansion, transitioning from intimate vintage rooms into a grand, open atrium before concluding in a spacious lounge. It begins in a green-walled living room as a character rises from a leather armchair and walks toward a long, paneled corridor illuminated by hanging chandeliers. As the character passes a guard and decorative screens, the scene opens onto a balcony overlooking a massive circular chandelier and a grand atrium featuring a long dining table and a bronze statue. The camera then shifts back into the upper hallways, moving past ornate mirrors and red leather chairs before entering a room with a black and white checkered floor and tall curtained windows. Finally, the character exits through a final hallway and opens large double doors to reveal a grand bar lounge with a high skylight and a body lying on the floor.
